# MLRecommender.ModelAlgorithmType

**Enumeration**

The algorithms a recommender can use to make recommendations.

## Declaration

```swift
enum ModelAlgorithmType
```

## Recommender algorithms

- **MLRecommender.ModelAlgorithmType.itemSimilarity(_:)**: An algorithm that compares the similarity from item to item.
- **MLRecommender.SimilarityType**: The metric by which the recommender computes item similarity.

## Algorithm descriptions

- **description**: A text representation of the recommender algorithm.
- **debugDescription**: A text representation of the recommender algorithm that’s suitable for output during debugging.
- **playgroundDescription**: A description of the recommender algorithm shown in a playground.

## Default Implementations

- **CustomDebugStringConvertible Implementations**
- **CustomPlaygroundDisplayConvertible Implementations**
- **CustomStringConvertible Implementations**

## Supporting types

- **MLRecommender.SimilarityType**: The metric by which the recommender computes item similarity.

## Conforms To

- Copyable
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomPlaygroundDisplayConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
